signals.headline: CEASEFIRE EXTENSION NOT CONFIRMED | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CEASEFIRE EXTENSION NOT CONFIRMED | NO | HIGH confidence**

White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt stated on April 15 that an extension of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is "not true at this moment."[4] However, reports indicate the United States and Iran are *considering* extending the ceasefire expiring on April 21 by two weeks to allow more negotiation time.[6]
